payload.title: Device management: list, rename, revoke
payload.description:
CLI commands to manage paired devices:
- `scope devices list` — table of name, paired_at, last_seen, cert serial
- `scope devices rename <name> <new>` — change display name
- `scope devices revoke <name>` — remove from devices.json AND add cert serial to a CRL file the server consults on every request

Acceptance:
- Revoked device's cert gets 401 on next request even though it chains to the CA
- CRL persisted to ~/.scope-hub/revoked.json; loaded into memory on serve, reloaded on signal
- last_seen updates per request (debounced to ~1/min per device to avoid disk thrash)

Depends on the pairing and mTLS stories.
